identity_policy.event_id: Stable BBE event id derived from game_pk, at_bat_number, pitch_number, and sv_id or play_id.
identity_policy.same_event_group_id: Defaults to event_id and groups same-event views, crops, and augmentations.
identity_policy.view_id: Identifies candidate view/source variants of the same event.

target_policy.missing_optional_labels: Keep rows and set target_available=false with label_missing_reason. Never fill xBA/xwOBA with zero.
target_policy.ops_policy: OPS is unavailable without PA-level manifest and is never an event-level BBE head.

clean_cohort_policy.home_run_sources: Controlled sample or smoke_test only; never the data universe.
